positive: A whimsical and detailed forest scene featuring bioluminescent flora and fauna. The central focus is a group of stylized, gentle woodland creatures (foxes, rabbits, deer) interacting beneath giant, glowing mushrooms. Style should be sophisticated stained-glass illustration meets modern minimalist vector art. The composition must be centered and symmetrical, with strong contrast created by the dark forest outlines against the bright, vibrant electric blue, neon green, and warm gold bioluminescence. High contrast silhouettes are essential. The aesthetic must be highly scalable and suitable for repeat patterns or single-placement apparel prints. Intricate linework, clean edges, deep saturation, ethereal glow, UHD, forest core, stained glass style, maximalist but clean composition
negative: blur, grain, artifact, watermark, signature, logo, text, low detail, bad anatomy, deformed, dirty, gritty, noise, monochrome, photorealism, blurry background, messy, bokeh
